message:
test(config): add validation, rotation, and pacing coverage (73.5%→76.0%)

Test GetAccountsForProvider, SuggestNextAccount, ValidateFileReservation,
ValidateMemoryConfig, ValidateActivityIndicatorConfig, ValidateRanoConfig,
validateSynthesisStrategy, dirWritable, and all AgentPacingConfig duration
helpers (ClaudeRampUpDelay, CodexRampUpDelay, GeminiRampUpDelay,
CooldownOnFailure).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
